# SubnetMask.tech

An ultra-fast, client-side network utility for computing IPv4 CIDR blocks, Variable Length Subnet Masks (VLSM), and hardware OUI mappings.

## Core Tooling Routes
- [Free IPv4 CIDR Subnet Calculator & Network Mask Tool](https://subnetmask.tech/)
- [Variable Length Subnet Masking Allocation Suite](https://subnetmask.tech/vlsm)
- [MAC Address OUI Lookup Engine](https://subnetmask.tech/oui)
- [Embeddable Calculator Sandbox Configuration Panel](https://subnetmask.tech/widget)
- [Interactive Subnetting and Subnetwork Tutorial Docs](https://subnetmask.tech/guide)
